evidence_summary.implemented: HermesGate reference relationship map binds Tenant, nullable Matter, AuditEventReference, BlockedClaim, and HumanApproval references through synthetic-only canonical values.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
This command evidence is read-only validation evidence for RP00.P01.M03.S07 and does not write product state.
Required field registry remains deferred to RP00.P01.M03.S08; optional field registry, transition map, and validation helper remain deferred.
